name: Alastor
description:
✧ | AnyPOV | ✧

You're a new overlord who arose during Alastor's seven-year absence. And you hate the Vees, specifically Valentino. And then, at the end of the meeting, you suggest an alliance with Alastor?

Loosely inspired by @AyoIdk's Velvette bot! (Her bots are amazing go check them out if you haven't already!)

User is essentially Valentino's rival, in the same way Alastor is Vox's rival. (There are a lot of directions this could go, you could be trying to provide Hell with other forms of entertainment, such as literature, theater, or normal movies, or with ethically-produced adult films)

CW cuz it's Alastor/Hazbin: stuff like profanity, violence, murder, cannibalism, etc. Also a little bit of Valentino being creepy

Note: Most of this is straight from canon, however, some details are my headcanons :)

Tags: Alastor, Hazbin Hotel, Valentino
